description:
This quiz tests Bash scripting skills including variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, and syntax gotchas. Difficulty ranges from basic to tricky, with an engaging and slightly humorous tone. It aims to help users sharpen or prove their shell scripting abilities.
Topics: variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, syntax gotchas
Audience: Bash users and shell scripters with basic to intermediate experience
